nasb.text: “Behold, a people is coming from the north, And a great nation and many kings Will be aroused from the remote parts of the earth.

esv.text: “Behold, a people comes from the north; a mighty nation and many kings are stirring from the farthest parts of the earth.

cnv.text: “看哪！有一個民族從北方而來， 有一大國和許多君王被激動， 從地極來到。

ccb.text: “看啊，大军要从北方而来， 一个强国及其盟军要从地极而来。
